prompt: 2x2 grid, 16:9, do mecca and 3 other famous cities, and 4 different render engines=>  A patisserie-style showpiece spells MECCA; pâte sucrée walls, laminated layers visible on cut faces, powdered sugar ‘snow’, chocolate truss bridges, isomalt glazing for water features.
